query: I edited my skill repo, bumped the version, and did acp. I ran /reload-plugins but my Claude Code session still shows the old version. Why, and how do I get the update?
expected_behavior: Explain /reload-plugins does NOT fetch from the remote — it only reloads locally-cached plugin definitions
Auto-update fires at Claude Code STARTUP only
To update now: restart Claude Code (pulls the clone AND reinstalls), OR /plugin marketplace update <name> then reinstall the plugin (separate steps)
Optionally verify the marketplace has autoUpdate: true in known_marketplaces.json
notes: The #1 confusion: reload != fetch; updates land at startup, not live in-session.
